summary: Tested Admin Dashboard pages, TradeSafe delivery endpoints, and navigation. All features working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All admin pages load with proper data, navigation works, clickable rows navigate to detail pages.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality. This is caused by the dynamic rendering wrapper in the table body.

✅ Backend: Admin transactions list returns array with proper fields
✅ Backend: Admin users list returns array with proper fields

✅ Backend: TradeSafe accept-delivery returns 400 for wrong state

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> in table rendering. This is a cosmetic warning caused by dynamic rendering wrappers and doesn't affect functionality. Could be fixed by adjusting the table row rendering logic to avoid wrapping <tr> elements.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features tested and working: 1) Admin Dashboard at /admin with stats cards (Total Users, Total Transactions, Total Revenue, Pending Disputes, Pending Verification), 2) Admin Transactions at /admin/transactions with clickable rows navigating to /admin/transaction/{id}, 3) Admin Users at /admin/users with clickable rows navigating to /admin/user/{id}, 4) Admin Disputes at /admin/disputes with clickable rows navigating to /admin/dispute/{id}, 5) TradeSafe delivery endpoints exist and have proper auth checks - start-delivery requires seller auth and FUNDS_RECEIVED state, accept-delivery requires buyer auth and INITIATED state, 6) Static files served from /uploads endpoint. The actual TradeSafe API calls require a real transaction in the correct state which wasn't available in test data, but endpoint structure and auth are verified.
